channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Pakistan says US-Iran deal may be reached ‘soon’
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran considering US proposal as Trump says war will be over quickly
- Iran and U.S. Consider One-Page Plan to End Hostilities, Iranian Officials Say
- US, Iran working on interim deal to halt war - Reuters - ایران اینترنشنال
- Iran and U.S. Consider One-Page Plan to End Hostilities, Iranian Officials Say
- Iran says no final decision yet on US proposal conveyed through Pakistan
- Live updates: US awaits Iran response on proposed war-ending deal
- Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Awaits Tehran’s Response to Peace Proposal
- U.S. Awaits Iran’s Response to Latest Peace Proposal to End War
- World in Waiting Game Over Iran Peace Proposal Response
- What are US proposals to end war, and will Iran agree to them?
- U.S. Awaits Iran’s Response to Latest Peace Proposal to End War
- Iran reviewing US proposal as Trump pressures Tehran for agreement on deal to end war
- U.S. Hopeful of Deal to End War as Iran Keeps World on Edge
- World in Waiting Game Over Iran Peace Proposal Response
- What are US proposals to end war, and will Iran agree to them?
- US-Iran deal may be reached soon: Pakistan
- World in Waiting Game Over Iran Peace Proposal Response
- Middle East tensions: Iran’s response to US peace proposal expected today
- Iran reviewing US proposal to end war
- Iran’s stance on US war negotiations explained
- Pakistan expects U.S.-Iran agreement "sooner rather than later"
- Middle East crisis live: Iran reviewing peace proposal as Trump says a deal ‘very possible’
- Iran reviews latest US proposal as Trump pushes for deal to end conflict
- US-Iran peace deal 'very possible' but Trump warns of intense bombing
- U.S. Hopeful of Deal to End War as Iran Keeps World on Edge
- Trump sees swift end to war as Iran reviews US peace proposal
- US, Iran near short deal to end hostilities
- Iran-Israel war LIVE: Trump says Iran deal 'very possible' but threatens strikes if talks fail
- Middle East crisis day 68 as it happened: Iran says it is reviewing US-backed peace proposal
- Iran reviewing US proposal to end war as Trump signals possible deal
- Trump sees swift end to war as Iran reviews US peace proposal
- Iran may respond to US proposal on May 7 — TV
- Trump sees swift end to war as Iran reviews US peace proposal
- Iran reviews US proposal as talks edge toward broader deal
- Trump sees swift end to war as Iran reviews US peace proposal
- Iran war: Trump optimistic for deal as Tehran yet to respond
- Iran reviewing US proposal to end war, though key demands remain unaddressed]]>

item.title: Around 40 passengers left cruise ship affected by Hantavirus outbreak at St. Helena
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Hantavirus update: Flight attendant's hospitalization sparks panic after cruise outbreak; details

- Virginia monitoring traveler linked to Hantavirus-hit cruise ship, says resident is low-risk
- Tenerife resort town awaits hantavirus-hit cruise ship
- Cruise ship hantavirus outbreak not start of pandemic: WHO
- U.S. Health Officials Monitor Cruise Passengers In Multiple States After Hantavirus Outbreak
- Hantavirus cruise ship outbreak: Andes strain not worrying experts amid fears of COVID-like lockdown

- WHO confirms five cases of hantavirus linked to cruise ship
- EU closely monitoring hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
- Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship not ‘another COVID’, WHO says
- Two Canadians Who Left Cruise Ship Struck by Hantavirus Outbreak Back in Ontario
- WHO Says Now Five Confirmed Cruise Ship Hantavirus Cases

- Passengers who left cruise early monitored for hantavirus in U.S., worldwide
- Countries track passengers of hantavirus-hit cruise ship
- WHO confirms five cases of hantavirus linked to cruise ship

- Global race under way to trace passengers who left hantavirus ship before outbreak confirmed

- Dozens Of Passengers Left Hantavirus-Stricken Cruise Ship After First Fatality

- Where did the cruise ship hantavirus come from and what happens next?

- Race to trace passengers who left hantavirus cruise ship at island

- ‘Possibility of more cases, but public risk remains low’: WHO on hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship

- Cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak heads to Canary Islands after 3 are evacuated
- Dozens of passengers left hantavirus-stricken cruise ship after 1st fatality
- Latest Evacuee From Hantavirus-hit Cruise Lands In Europe

- Passenger from Hantavirus-hit ship speaks to Al Jazeera from isolation
- Nations race to trace passengers of hantavirus-hit cruise ship
- Hantavirus strain capable of human transmission found in 2 cruise ship passengers, officials say

- WHO presser, manhunt for 40 passengers, US states on alert: Top developments in cruise ship hantavirus outbreak case

- Britons on hantavirus-hit ship to be asked to isolate back in UK for 45 days
- Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship; 40 passengers disembark on South Atlantic island
- Hantavirus cruise outbreak: Two Britons self-isolate after exposure scare on MV Hondius

- What is hantavirus? Symptoms, cause behind spread explained as outbreak on ship sparks concerns
- Health Authorities Monitor Hantavirus Cruise Passengers in United States
- Argentina races to find origins of cruise ship hantavirus outbreak, amid reports some passengers have returned to US
- Hantavirus outbreak, death rate, contagious, incubation period: Is Hantavirus the Next Covid? Expert raises 'serious' warning
- Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Heads to Spain After 3 People Evacuated
- Health Authorities Monitor Hantavirus Cruise Passengers in United States
- ‘Very limited experience…’: Experts provide key update after 3 evacuated from hantavirus-hit ship
- Hantavirus update: Where are the 23 cruise passengers? How many cases confirmed?]]>
